channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Oscars 2026: KPop Demon Hunters’ “Golden” Wins Best Original Song
item.description: 🌟 KPop sensation KPop Demon Hunters slay at the Oscars with the award-winning track "Golden"! 🏆🎶 #KPopRoyalty #Oscars2026

item.title: Oscars 2026: Watch Miles Caton, Raphael Saadiq, and More Perform “I Lied to You”
item.description: 🎶 Get ready to groove with Miles Caton, Raphael Saadiq, and friends at the 2026 Oscars! 🌟 #MusicMagic #Oscars2026

item.title: Oscars 2026 Winners: See the Full List
item.description: 🏆🎶 And the Oscar for Best Soundtrack goes to... Dive into the winners' playlist! 🎉🎬 #Oscars2026 #MusicWinners

item.title: Harry Styles Dances His Way to the Top of the Billboard 200
item.description: 🎶 Harry Styles is bringing the moves and the grooves as he conquers the Billboard 200 charts! 💃🕺 #HarryStyles #Billboard200 #MusicNews

item.title: Firefly Animated Series Now in Development, Nathan Fillion Says
item.description: 🌟 Serenity is soaring to new heights! Exciting news from Nathan Fillion on the Firefly animated series! 🚀 #BrowncoatsUnite
